vibe: Cyberpunk Tokyo meets Traditional Japanese Dark Aesthetic. Deep, dark void base with highly saturated neon accents and subtle traditional textures (wabi-sabi, kanji, seigaiha) in low opacity.

scale.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl tracking-tighter uppercase font-headings

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous. p-6, p-8, p-12. Avoid cramped UI.

header.classes: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10

anime_card.style: Tracing Beam / Glow effect on hover
anime_card.base: relative rounded-lg overflow-hidden group cursor-pointer bg-[#111111] border border-white/5
anime_card.image: w-full h-full object-cover transition-transform duration-500 group-hover:scale-110
anime_card.overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/90 via-black/40 to-transparent opacity-80 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity
anime_card.content: absolute bottom-0 left-0 w-full p-4 flex flex-col justify-end translate-y-4 group-hover:translate-y-0 transition-transform

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF0055] text-white px-6 py-3 font-headings uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-[#FF0055]/80 transition-colors shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,0,85,0.4)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#00F0FF] text-[#00F0FF] px-6 py-3 font-headings uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-[#00F0FF]/10 transition-colors

search_bar.input: w-full bg-[#111111] border border-white/10 rounded-full px-8 py-5 text-lg text-white focus:outline-none focus:border-[#00F0FF] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00F0FF] transition-all placeholder-white/30 backdrop-blur-md

badges.genre: px-3 py-1 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider border border-white/10 rounded-full bg-white/5 text-white/80

tabs.list: flex space-x-1 bg-[#111111] p-1 rounded-lg border border-white/5
tabs.trigger: px-4 py-2 text-sm text-white/60 hover:text-white rounded-md transition-colors data-[state=active]:bg-white/10 data-[state=active]:text-white

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Neon glow (box-shadow), 1px solid border color change to cyan or magenta.
motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: Anime poster tilt/scale up slightly, reveal info from bottom on hover.

media.instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Import Google Fonts: Bebas Neue, Shippori Mincho, and Outfit in the global CSS or head. 2. For anime posters, strictly fetch from the DB/Jikan API as per user constraints. 3. Use the background images provided for hero sections, blending them heavily with the background color (#050505) using opacity (max 30-40%) or a heavy gradient overlay. 4. Apply the texture image with mix-blend-overlay and 5% opacity across major sections to break digital flatness.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over images has dark gradients behind it. Neon colors on dark background generally pass APCA, but verify text readability.

testing.attributes: Add data-testid attributes (kebab-case) to all interactive elements (e.g., search-input, anime-card-[id], genre-filter-[name]).
